General.Name: YD Bio Ltd
General.Description: YD Bio Limited a biopharmaceutical company focuses on blood-based cancer detection and develops stem cell- and exosome-based therapeutics to transform the treatment of spectrum of diseases with unmet medical needs. The company is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

1.Name: Mr. Edmund  Hen CPA, F.C.A., M.S.
1.Title: Chief Financial Officer
